{"id":"project-LICHEN-nhwc","title":"senml: core::error::Error impl requires nightly or recent stable","description":"File: rust/lichen-senml/src/cbor.rs
Lines: 40-47

The CborError type implements core::error::Error:
```rust
impl core::error::Error for CborError {
    fn source(&self) -> Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)> {
```

core::error::Error was stabilized in Rust 1.81.0 (September 2024). Before that, no_std crates needed to either:
1. Use the error_in_core feature flag (nightly)
2. Depend on a compatibility crate
3. Only implement std::error::Error behind a feature flag

The Cargo.toml shows no MSRV (minimum supported Rust version). If the project needs to support Rust < 1.81, this implementation would fail to compile.

Impact: Compilation failure on Rust < 1.81.0

Fix: Either:
1. Document MSRV >= 1.81.0 in Cargo.toml: `rust-version = "1.81"`
2. Gate the impl behind a feature flag for older Rust versions","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:29.648087Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:29.648131Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-nhwc","title":"senml: core::error::Error impl requires nightly or recent stable","description":"File: rust/lichen-senml/src/cbor.rs
Lines: 40-47

The CborError type implements core::error::Error:
```rust
impl core::error::Error for CborError {
    fn source(&self) -> Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)> {
```

core::error::Error was stabilized in Rust 1.81.0 (September 2024). Before that, no_std crates needed to either:
1. Use the error_in_core feature flag (nightly)
2. Depend on a compatibility crate
3. Only implement std::error::Error behind a feature flag

The Cargo.toml shows no MSRV (minimum supported Rust version). If the project needs to support Rust < 1.81, this implementation would fail to compile.

Impact: Compilation failure on Rust < 1.81.0

Fix: Either:
1. Document MSRV >= 1.81.0 in Cargo.toml: `rust-version = "1.81"`
2. Gate the impl behind a feature flag for older Rust versions","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:29.648087Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:40.639460242Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:40.639460242Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:40.639460242Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:40.639460242Z"}
